color-no-hex.message: Hex color literal. Use var(--color-*) from src/design_tokens.css. See AGENTS.md §5.8.

function-disallowed-list.message: Color function literal. Use var(--color-*) or var(--shadow-*) from src/design_tokens.css. See AGENTS.md §5.8.

property-disallowed-list.message: Typography property declared directly. Pull a use case via `composes: <className> from '../typography.module.css'` instead. True one-offs (a single transport glyph, a modal title) may add `/* stylelint-disable-next-line property-disallowed-list -- <reason> */` with a one-line rationale. See AGENTS.md §5.8.

declaration-property-value-allowed-list.message: `font-family` outside src/typography.module.css must be `inherit` (a reset on a UA-styled element). Custom families belong in typography.module.css.
